route53recoveryreadiness.cell.CfnAbout: Creates a cell in an account.

route53recoveryreadiness.cell.CellName.Description: The name of the cell to create.

route53recoveryreadiness.cell.Cells.Description: A list of cell Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) contained within this cell, for use in nested cells. For example, Availability Zones within specific AWS Regions.

route53recoveryreadiness.cell.Tags.Description: A collection of tags associated with a resource.
